settings.title: ⚙️ hub Settings
projectList.col.name: Project
projectList.footStatus: hub toggle → auto-render on/off · click row → select · double-click/button → open in VSCode · ESC · ✕ · click outside to close
projectList.masterAllOn: All on — click to turn all off
projectList.masterAllOff: All off — click to turn all on
statusbar.rescanTitle: Manually scan registered project disks once to collect missing htm/dash artifacts into the registry
liveSessions.title: 📡 Active sessions
liveSessions.zombieTitle: Bulk-terminate empty (pre-prompt) zombie claude sessions then refresh — working sessions (with titles) and dashboards are preserved
dashboard.sort.name: Name
dashboard.clearTitle: Remove dashboards with status done/stopped/stale from the hub list (registry) — actual files are preserved
htmDocs.title: 📄 hub docs
htmDocs.filterTitle: Add project filter (multi-select — today's additions always shown)
htmDocs.keepTitle: Keep only the 12 most recent (by mtime) in the hub list and remove the rest from registry — actual .html files preserved
htmDocs.clearTitle: Remove all hub docs from the hub list (registry) — actual .html files preserved
feed.title: 🔔 Activity feed
feed.keepTitle: Keep latest 20 and remove the rest
settings.advancedWarn: ⚠️ bind_host: 0.0.0.0 + omitted advertise_host = hub unreachable. When opening 0.0.0.0, set advertise_host to a concrete IP/domain (Issue153). Changing bind_host requires a server restart.
liveSessions.dismissTitle: Hide this session card from the hub list (does not terminate the claude process)
liveSessions.dismissConfirm:
This hides the session card from the hub list. (the claude process is not terminated)
Continue?
liveSessions.zombieConfirm:
This terminates all empty (pre-prompt) zombie claude sessions.
Working sessions (with titles) and dashboards are preserved.
Continue?
liveSessions.approveConfirm: Approve waiting item '{item}' to proceed. Continue?
htmDocs.removeFromListTitle: Remove from hub list only — actual file preserved
htmDocs.keepConfirm:
Removes hub docs except the 12 most recent (by mtime) from the hub list.
Actual .html files are not deleted. Proceed?
htmDocs.clearConfirm:
Removes all hub docs from the hub list.
Actual .html files are not deleted. Proceed?
feed.clearConfirm: This clears all items in the activity feed. Proceed?
dashboard.clearConfirm:
Removes dashboards with status done/stopped/stale from the hub list.
Actual .dash.*/.html files are not deleted. Proceed?
statusbar.noRescan: Nothing new to collect (registry up to date)
projectList.selected: ✅ Selected: {path} — double-click/button to open in VSCode
projectList.selectFirst: Click a project row to select first
msg.qaErr: B-mode Q&A response not received (retrieval expired)
settings.apply.auto: 🟢 Auto — applied on save. The hub server detects the file change and reloads automatically. No further action.
settings.apply.hook: 🔵 Next turn — applied from the next render. Claude uses the new value when drawing its next response.
settings.apply.restart: 🟠 restart — server restart required. Run /dashboard-server restart to apply (values like bind_host are read once at startup).
htmDocs.focusSessionTitle: Focus the session tab that created this doc
settings.field.browser_open: Browser auto-open — off(chat URL only)/background(open -g, no focus steal)/foreground(steal focus)
settings.field.browser_focus: [deprecated → browser_open] focus steal. hook references this only as fallback when browser_open is unset
settings.field.browser_tab_reuse: Reuse a single /hub tab (Issue171). Renders (..show/..ask) always open a new tab regardless. 🚧 new-semantics hook impl global Issue153
settings.field.language: hub UI language — en(English, default)/ko(Korean). Applied after page reload on save
settings.field.feed_default_visible: Whether the feed sidebar is shown initially
settings.field.live_session_show_empty: Show empty live sessions before a prompt (false=hidden)
settings.field.search_limit: File cap per directory on disk rescan (0=unlimited)
settings.field.feed_limit: Max items kept/shown in the feed
settings.field.feed_show_project_emoji: Show project emoji on feed items
settings.field.feed_show_project_name: Show project name on feed items
settings.field.bind_host: hub server listen interface (127.0.0.1/0.0.0.0/IP). Restart required on change
settings.field.advertise_host: hub|both URL host (falls back to bind_host if omitted). Do not omit with 0.0.0.0
